summary: Run the packaged full scan script from official ZAP Docker images.
examples: Generate an HTML report from a nightly scan.
Tune warnings with a configuration file.
content:
## Overview
Run the packaged full scan script from official ZAP Docker images.

### Why it matters
This guide turns a ZAP feature into a repeatable workflow you can share across teams.

### Preparation
- Confirm scope and permissions.
- Ensure required add-ons are installed.
- Decide how you will capture evidence.
title: Docker Full Scan Workflow (Workflow 14)
steps: Pull the stable ZAP Docker image.
Run zap-full-scan.py with a target URL.
Mount a working directory for reports.
Use exit codes to drive CI results.
